outcome_record.event_name: Autumn Internationals 2026 — New Zealand vs England (Twickenham)

prediction.pre_match_note: Autumn Internationals. NZ at Twickenham. All Blacks vs England — tier 1 test rugby. All Blacks quality advantage. England home at Twickenham (80,000 capacity). Kicker form: NZ elite kicker confirmed. Set piece: NZ lineout 89%.

calibration_flags.notes: Elite kicker + set piece dominance combination validated. NZ kicker accuracy + 89% lineout = composite modifier correctly predicted touring side winning at Twickenham.
